gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; moreover, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
